zh: 王老五是個已離婚的男人、
en: Mr. Wang is a divorced man,

zh: 目前與獨生女住在一起、
en: currently living with his only daughter.

zh: 女兒六歲上幼兒園大班、
en: She is six and in her final year of preschool,
a sweet-tempered girl who clings to her father.

zh: 但王老五卻覺得女兒很煩、
en: But Mr. Wang finds her annoying,
saying she keeps him from focusing on his work,

zh: 而王老五的太太是主動提出離婚、
en: But it was his wife who actively asked for the divorce,

zh: 所以王老五不應該把家長離婚的問題怪罪於女兒、
en: so he shouldn't blame the divorce on his daughter.

zh: 一般來說王老五要能面對離婚的失落感、
en: Generally speaking, he must face his own sense of loss from the divorce,

zh: 建議讓女兒了解到父母離婚的原因絕對不是因為女兒的緣故、
en: He should help his daughter understand the divorce has nothing to do with her,

zh: 雖然離婚了但是父母都還是很愛她的、
en: that even after the divorce, both parents still love her deeply.

zh: 並且鼓勵女兒說出自己內心的想法、
en: And he should encourage her to share her inner thoughts,
so no shadow is cast over her childhood.
